01.frontDescription: Live US equities and crypto prices, refreshed every minute.
01.backDescription: S&P 500, NASDAQ, DOW, BTC, ETH and 4,000+ tickers, streamed straight from trusted providers.

02.frontDescription: Pattern detection and signal scoring on every chart.
02.backDescription: Trend, momentum and volatility models surface what matters before you scroll past it.

03.frontDescription: BTC dominance and Fear & Greed at a glance.
03.backDescription: Track historical sentiment shifts and dominance flows to time the market with context.

04.frontDescription: From beginner basics to technical analysis playbooks.
04.backDescription: Curated video lessons, glossaries and walkthroughs available in four languages.

fearGreed.title: Bitcoin Fear & Greed Index
fearGreed.subtitle: Based on price and volume, market sentiment is classified into five stages from fear to greed.
fearGreed.currentDescription: The index is meeting psychological resistance and support from market participants. In a market with high volume and liquidity, this signals a critical zone for short-term price action.

about.title: About CrestLab
about.description: CrestLab is an AI-powered global financial information platform. We deliver real-time data on US equities and cryptocurrencies, putting everything investors need in one place.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Empowering investors worldwide with reliable financial data and analytics tools to support informed investment decisions.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To become the global leader in AI- and data-driven financial information platforms.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The information provided on this website does not constitute investment, financial, or other professional advice. Any investment decisions made based on information from this site are solely the user's responsibility. Past performance does not guarantee future results, and all investments carry the risk of principal loss.
